__fixture__.name: restricted_managed_only_grace_degraded
__fixture__.scenario: Grace-degraded managed posture. The managed convenience layer is temporarily unreachable, so the install runs in a bounded grace state: managed features narrow to inspect-only, the self-hosted IdP path remains usable via the system browser, and local workspace / Git / tasks / BYOK AI continue without interruption. The packet keeps the visible recovery path explicit and names the exact narrowed capabilities rather than rendering an ambiguous `Connected` badge.

destination_class_label: Customer-managed identity provider (system browser) – managed services degraded

return_route.return_target_label: Aureline desktop – payments-prod workspace (managed services degraded)

preserved_local_work.note: Managed services are unreachable. Local workspace, local Git, local tasks, and BYOK AI remain available. Managed settings sync and managed AI quota stay narrowed until the callback returns or the managed service recovers.
retained_capabilities: Open, edit, save, and undo the payments-prod workspace locally.
Search over the local workspace and local history.
Run local Git commands and commit locally.
Run local tasks and debuggers in the trusted workspace.
Use BYOK AI providers and local model execution.
Use the self-hosted IdP path through the system browser.
blocked_capabilities: Fetch managed settings sync until managed services recover.
Open managed marketplace or managed AI quota views.
Publish through managed-only lanes that require the hosted convenience layer.

recovery_path.recovery_copy_label: Managed services are temporarily unreachable. Continue sign-in in your browser through the self-hosted path, or keep working locally.

reserved_rows.note: Passkey / WebAuthn step-up via the system browser remains available even while the managed convenience layer is degraded.
Managed session expired during the degradation window; reauth required through the system browser once the managed service recovers or via the self-hosted IdP path now.
Reserved for the managed seat-removal row; local-only work MUST remain representable.
Declares that managed deprovision MUST preserve local workspace, local Git, local tasks, and BYOK AI capability.
